title: Phantasia Origins
description: A plethora of DnD inspired origins.
body:
Adds a plethora of new Dungeons & Dragons inspired origins with unique powers and downsides. Designed to be balanced with both vanilla and heavily modded Minecraft.

Requires [Origins](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/origins), [Extra Origins](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/extra-origins) and [Pehkui](https://modrinth.com/mod/pehkui)
